title: Design System: Smart Cities and Sustainable Development Academy

shadows.name: Image Panel Shadow
shadows.purpose: Separate large research visuals from the page surface.

motion.name: Restrained State Motion
motion.purpose: Interactive feedback only; evidence comprehension must not depend on motion.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Gold institutional CTA for the most important evidence path.
components.css: .ds-button-primary { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; min-height:44px; padding:.72rem 1rem; border:1px solid #b7822b; border-radius:8px; background:#b7822b; color:#17120a; font-family:Aptos, 'Avenir Next', 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; font-weight:700; text-decoration:none; } .ds-button-primary:hover { background:#a37325; border-color:#a37325; } .ds-button-primary:focus-visible { outline:3px solid #0e6d6b; outline-offset:3px; }

components.name: Evidence Card
components.description: Flat bordered evidence container with restrained institutional spacing.
components.html:
Platform leadership

Source-bounded public evidence for academic review.
components.css: .ds-evidence-card { padding:1.35rem; border:1px solid #d8e0df; border-radius:8px; background:#ffffff; color:#122124; font-family:Aptos, 'Avenir Next', 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; } .ds-evidence-card h3 { margin:0 0 .65rem; color:#084f50; font-size:1.18rem; line-height:1.2; } .ds-evidence-card p { margin:0; color:#405054; line-height:1.6; }

components.name: Evidence Callout
components.description: Softly tinted claim boundary without side-stripe decoration.
components.html: Use cautious, source-bounded wording for public academic review.
components.css: .ds-callout { padding:1.25rem; border:1px solid rgba(14,109,107,.22); border-radius:0; background:#edf3f1; color:#405054; font-family:Aptos, 'Avenir Next', 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; line-height:1.6; }

narrative.overview: A carefully maintained institutional record: calm, legible and serious, with enough editorial presence to support an international academic audience.
keyCharacteristics: Light pages with teal and gold accents used sparingly
Serif headings for authority and sans body text for scanning
Real research imagery rather than fake screenshots

rules.name: The Caution Rule
rules.body: Teal and gold mark evidence hierarchy. They do not create decorative gradients, glows or attention effects.

rules.name: The Flat Evidence Rule
rules.body: Evidence cards stay flat. If every item has a shadow, none of the evidence feels more credible.

dos: Do keep SCSDA institution-first, with Dr Han's role evidenced inside the institution.
Do use preserved public visuals and source-bounded wording.
Do keep typography calm and readable.
donts: Don't make the site look like a generic AI-generated SaaS landing page.
Don't use purple-blue gradients, glassmorphism, fake dashboards or nested card layouts.
Don't imply government authority, official authorization, confidential access or public-security work.
